# Known-flaky test files: one extended regex per line, matched against the
# failing test FILE paths parsed from a red Test job's logs. The Fleet
# Shepherd only auto-reruns a failed run when EVERY failing test matches a
# line here — one unknown failure means the run is left for the autofix loop
# (or a human) instead of being retried blindly.
#
# Add a line only for failures repeatedly observed to pass on plain re-run
# with no related diff. Remove lines when the underlying test is hardened.

# web-tree-sitter WASM load exceeds the 5s vitest timeout on contended runners.
shell-ast-parser-lazy\.test\.ts

# Timer-precision flake: "appends a scheduled run record on each recurring fire".
cronScheduler\.test\.ts

# fs-heavy persistence test (~3s locally) that times out on loaded runners.
workspace-registration-store\.test\.ts
